sous_titres.text: I love you, Kagami.
Living so far apart is hard.
I miss you more every day.
It's an ordeal we'll get through.
We'll see each other again next week then?
Same spot, same time?
If all goes well.
Wind Dragon!
I miss you so much, Adrien.
It's hard, you being so far away.
I miss you too, Marinette. I'm only staying in New York
for a few days. I'm coming back to you soon.
Oh, I wish I was there with you.
We could be dancing together
like we did on our school trip.
- Remember? - Hold on.
What is it?
Click on the link and you'll see.
It's our song!
Care to dance?
Mm.
Ah, I'm sorry, I gotta go. I promised my parents
I'd read them a bedtime story tonight.
You read bedtime stories to...
Gotta go, talk soon!
Storm Subsides.
Marinette, Tokyo needs you
or rather it needs Ladybug.
Tokyo?
A giant monster destroyed Tokyo's city hall in Japan,
but fortunately, a new hero team whose name remains unknown
managed to stop it before it could do any more damage.
Oh, well, if everything is taken care of,
they don't need Ladybug.
They do, but I'll explain later.
- We have to leave right away. - Right away?
As in, like, right now?
But is your mother okay with this?
I didn't give her a choice.
And what will you tell your boyfriend?
Nothing. Felix is in London anyway.
He won't even know I left Paris.
But what do I tell my parents?
Marinette?
Mom, Dad, I just wanted to ask you,
uh, could I go to Tokyo for a few days with Kagami?
Well, uh, tickets to Japan
are quite expensive, you know, honey?
Kagami's mother has a private jet,
- it wouldn't cost a thing. - But when would you leave?
Well, actually, um...
I already have?
Good evening, Mr. and Mrs. Dupain-Cheng.
Don't worry, we'll be staying at my grandmother's.
Tatsu, transmit Obaa-chan's coordinates.
Uh, we were going to say yes anyway.
Have fun, girls.
Thank you so much! Love you, Mom!
Love you, Dad! You're the best!
Tokyo, here we come!
Shoot! In all the rush, I completely forgot
- to pack my clothes. - Don't worry. I have clothes.
Uh, yeah!
Thanks, that's great, uh...
but is there any chance you have a sewing machine onboard?
Ta-da!
Marinette, I want you to hear a conversation between members
of this Japanese superhero team.
Uh, I don't know Japanese, you know?
Ah, that is a problem.
I've given it some thought and I might have a solution.
Hey, Tikki, what are you doing?
Tikki will help you understand Japanese
and speak it too.
Hontoni? Are?
Sugoi! Uh, I mean,
so cool!
I propose a tournament. Whoever wins becomes our leader.
- That's Miki. - We don't need a leader.
We're a group. We all decide together.
- Mayotte. - If it's anything like finding
our team name, we're in trouble.
- That's Pili. - I've got a name!
The Super Rainbow Cockroaches!
- Nikko. - Cockroaches?
- Yu-Lu. - What? Cockroaches are cute.
If everyone had taken part in the invocation,
we'd have beaten that monster faster.
We have to protect the people!
And who is he?
Kazuno.
Kazuno, okay.
Yes, well...
Why do you always refuse
to do the summonings with us?
I have no sense of rhythm anyway.
Come on, I've seen you dance before.
I don't wanna dance anymore.
Do you see the problem now? They're too divided.
They'll never make it on their own.
How come you're in these Japanese superheroes' group chat?
They forgot to remove me.
You know these superheroes?
They used to be my friends.
You used to have friends?
I mean, you had friends in Japan, which makes sense, right?
Before we met, before we became friends.
Why did you say "used to be friends"?
You aren't friends anymore?
It's ancient history.
Go on, tell me.
There is nothing to tell.
Okay.
I'm gonna have some orange juice, want anything?
No, thanks.
I'm not sure these Tokyo superheroes need Ladybug, Tikki.
Something tells me it's more a case of Kagami needing Marinette.
Anywho, what's Tokyo like compared to Paris?
Different. Very different.
Wow! It's huge! Oh...
It's not that different after all.
It's the Tokyo Tower. Its architect was inspired by the Eiffel Tower.
Wow! So beautiful!
You are French?
I am, but Kagami was born here.
Oh, I love France!
Look!
The Eiffel Tower, croissants, cheese,
accordion music, and Ladybug!
Ah, Miraculous Ladybug!
- Thank you and goodbye, sir. - Goodbye, girls,
and vive la France!
This is where my grandmother lives.
It smells so good! What's this?
Dorayaki, a local pastry.
Obaa-san makes the best in Tokyo.
Wow!
Tadaima, Obaa-san!
Okaerinasai, Ka-chan.
You must be Marinette. Bienvenue.
Pleased to meet you, ma... Huh?
Oops, sorry! Hehe...
I forgot, no shoes when entering a Japanese person's house.
I'm so happy to finally meet one of Kagami's friends.
You must be very hungry.
I prepared a little something for you.
There! A weak point!
It's not a weak point, it's a car, you stupid...
You're no use to me at all.
If that's what you wanted, you should have modeled us a brain, master.
If we all take part in the Ultimate Summoning,
- who will protect the people? - The faster we beat the bad guy,
the sooner people will be out of harm's way.
There's the weak point.
Which one's the weak point? The boy or the girl?
These humans are weak.
Because they want to protect other humans.
{\an8}This is what you call "a little something"?
Please, enjoy your meal.
Itadakimasu!
Bon appétit to you too.
It's so good!
What a nice surprise to see you here.
I wanted to show Marinette Tokyo.
Well, you're in luck then
because tomorrow is the Hoshi Matsuri.
- We'll have a booth. - The what?
The Hoshi Matsuri, it's a traditional festival.
In Japan, we have a very rich folklore
filled with fantastical creatures
like yokai for example.
We have many legends such as that of Princess Orihime
and Hikoboshi the cowherd,
two lovers condemned to live far apart,
each on one side of the Celestial River,
but who are allowed to meet once a year.
That is the legend that we celebrate during the Hoshi Matsuri.
Ah, it's such a romantic festival!
You'll probably run into your old classmates
and your old boyfriend.
What was his name again? Kazuno?
He wasn't my boyfriend and I wasn't planning on
going to the Matsuri. I have other plans.
Such a shame.
That's Shinobu-san.
Your room is ready, I prepared two yukatas, I hope they fit.
Come on, Marinette.
I can't move. Roll me there, will you?
Where do you want to go, ma'am?
Oh!
Hey, what are you doing to my taxi?
Ah!
I'm upgrading it.
Wow!
It's so cute!
Is this your old room?
Mm, I'm going to change clothes.
Which one is Kazuno? The small, shy one?
The tall, hefty one? Or the cute one winking at us dressed in black?
Put on your yukata and meet me in the bathroom when you're ready.
Huh? To do what?
- To take a bath? - Together? The two of us?
In Japan, bathing isn't just about washing.
It's a ritual, a moment of sharing.
Why won't Kagami talk about her old friends
or her former boyfriend who wasn't her boyfriend?
I don't know, Tikki, but I sure hope she'll share that with me
on top of the bathing ritual.
Hm?
Here, kid, the bathroom is this way.
Uh, right, anyhow,
there's still work to do for tomorrow.
Hm?
I think I just saw a yokai.
Did your yokai have white around her eyes
and multi-colored hair?
Uh, yes?
That was Shinobu, my grandmother's friend.
Put your yukata in the basket.
You have to shower first
so you don't dirty the bathwater.
Gotcha!
This is so nice.
So, this Kazuno guy,
can you tell me now, was he a boyfriend?
I already told you he wasn't.
Oh, but your grandmother said...
He didn't love me.
Oh, sorry.
But you... did you...
Now's not the time to talk about that.
Enjoy the bath in silence.
Wasn't the bath supposed to be a time for sharing?
If Adrien told you about his childhood,
you can easily imagine what mine was like.
Like him, I was raised away from the outside world.
Teachers came to the house.
I only went out for fencing competitions.
I had no friends, and then...
my 14th birthday arrived.
- Mother? - I'm working.
I'm turning 14 today.
- What do you want? - To go to school.
No, pick something else.
No!
If this ring doesn't touch the ground,
you will go to school.
Oh, wow.
Talk about an entrance exam.
After that, my mother enrolled me at the Kano Academy,
an international school that combines sports and academics.
It was so new to me that I didn't know how to go about it.
Hm?
Hm? Hm...
- Hey, new girl. - Huh?
What's your sport? Mine's kickboxing!
What's this? A giant knitting needle?
Since when is knitting a sport?
Are you guys kidding? It's a foil!
The new girl is a fencer!
Maneuverability, precision, elegance!
French excellence in a nutshell.
Excellence? Great.
Let's see what you got, newbie.
Ugh, Miki, Miki, Miki.
See that red button over there?
Whoever reaches it fastest wins.
Yu-Lu!
Get set, go!
5.3 seconds!
You beat the school record again!
Think you can do better, new girl?
If I succeed, you will be my friend for two weeks.
Uh...
Okay, sure. Yu-Lu.
Get set, go!
0.5 seconds!
That's a new school record.
Hey, you cheated!
You said to reach the button, which I did.
Not like that!
You didn't specify.
And you want us to be friends?
For two weeks. You gave your word.
Who are you? Where did you come from?
Tsurugi Kagami, Tokyo, Chuo-ku, Ginza district.
Are you making fun of me?
Oh, sorry, girls. I tripped!
Are you all right?
I'll be your friend if you want,
and not just for two weeks.
What do I have to do for this to happen?
You just have to want it.
Hm...
So, did you take his hand?
- No. - No?
The distance between his hand and mine
seemed insurmountable.
That someone could be nice to me
without asking for anything in return
was inconceivable.
My mother had never taught me what love was.
Kazuno introduced me to it.
Hm?
Wahoo!
And so you two fell in love?
I did, but...
he was already in love with Miki.
Oh, no.
I'm so sorry.
I couldn't understand why he would love someone
who was so hard on everyone, including him.
But this little twinge in my heart was nothing
compared to the bite of the loneliness
in which I had lived until then.
Just having a friend for the first time in my life
was enough to make me happy.
That's when Kazuno added me to the class chat group,
so that I could get to know the others more easily,
but I never dared send a message.
And then my mother decided that we would move to France.
You can tell me, you know?
We're not just here to help these superheroes save Tokyo.
We're here because you're still in love with Kazuno, aren't you?
I keep telling you I'm not!
What is it? An earthquake?
A kaiju!
- A kai-what? - A giant monster.
It's time to do what we came here to do!
Longg, Bring the Storm!
Tikki, Spots On!
Wind Dragon!
- Get to safety! - Over here!
Go take cover, quick!
- We should wait for the others. - The longer we wait,
the more dangerous for the people.
I bet a date with you I'll take it down first.
In your dreams, pretty boy!
Aries Laser!
Is that the best you can do?
Leo Blade!
So, am I the best or am I the best?
Sagittarius Armor!
Come on, don't be mad, Aries. What do I win?
The award for almost causing a major disaster!
Oh.
But you did awesome, Sagittarius.
That's what teamwork's about, isn't it?
Whoa, that's one tough kaiju.
This way!
Huh?
Hey, now's not the time for daydreaming, Capricorn.
I'm not dreaming, I'm looking at those strange marks
on that kaiju, what are they?
Huh? The only thing stranger is your lack of focus!
Huh?
But where are the marks now?
See? They're out of control.
They do kinda lack teamwork,
but what do you want me to do about it?
I dunno, do your guardian stuff. Teach them to fight together.
I'm not their guardian. What gives me the right
to give them advice? They could be offended and rightly so.
They're new heroes, they'll learn.
So, we've come all this way for nothing.
Lucky Charm!
See? Even the Lucky Charm is telling us
to go back to Paris.
No, there must be another explanation.
What's going on? Am I hallucinating or what?
Kazuno! Storm Dragon!
You must do your invocations like the others.
Huh?
- Ryuko! - You know her?
She's a French superhero!
What are you doing in Tokyo, Frenchie?
I've come to help you.
You think we need help?
Evidently.
Kagami, Kagami, Kagami.
Watch out!
Okay, we've got this. Let's do a summoning and finish this!
I'll protect the civilians in the meantime.
No, you know we can't do this without you.
She's right.
Huh?
Dance!
Capricorn, the time is now.
What are you waiting for?
I... I can't. I'll take care of the civilians.
Don't worry, Leo. I'm here, I got this.
Buster 4!
With this, we're sure to crush it in no time.
Oh, I love France!
Look!
Ryuko, they cannot fire!
- Wait! - Fire!
There was a human inside the kaiju!
Ladybug?
How do you know there was a human inside the kaiju?
Intuition. I'd rather not take the chance.
Miraculous Ladybug!
Awesome.
Now we have to do it all over again.
If there's a human inside the supervillain,
you can't destroy it.
There must be another way to defeat it.
Lucky Charm!
So, that's your plan? To do a little coloring
while a monster destroys the whole city?
Maybe I was wrong.
Maybe we never should have come.
No, you were right. The Lucky Charm Eiffel Tower
was telling us to help them. They really need us.
There! Did you see them?
Your strange marks again?
Can you describe what you're seeing?
Some spots are lighting up on the monster's body.
Okay, use this to show us where the light spots are.
Come on, let's go!
Well done, Capricorn!
See the spots on the kaiju's body?
Everyone, aim at one at the same time!
How can we know this is a good idea?
Ladybug always has good ideas.
I just wanna help you, Leo.
Hm...
Fine. Ready, team?
Ya!
Wind Dragon!
What happened?
Ladybug?
It's the best day of my life!
Can I have an autograph?
So, there was a human inside.
The Super Stellar Organization wins again!
No, not that team name either, Aries.
And we didn't win at all. We nearly disintegrated
the poor taxi driver!
Thanks, Ladybug!
And vive la France!
How come you're in Tokyo, Ladybug?
Are you here for long? Do you have somewhere to stay?
Otherwise, you can come to my place!
Uh, I was in the area
and thanks, but I already have a place to stay.
And we're going to leave and stop bothering you all.
Huh?
Wait!
Have we met before?
No, never.
Wind Dragon!
Forgive her, she has a bad case of jetlag. See you another time!
Nice intuition you got earlier, Frenchie. Well done.
Yes, you're welcome.
Bug out!
- Do you like her? - Huh? Who?
Ryuko. I saw the way you were looking at her.
Huh? Of course not.
I wasn't looking at her in any special way.
Mm-hm.
We're done here, right? Shall we head back?
What's wrong with me?
I'm useless, I'm not worthy of being a stellar.
You may not believe in yourself,
but I believe in you, Kazuno.
Everything's gonna be all right.
Capricorn is Kazuno, isn't he?
Yes.
I feel like you haven't told me everything.
You asked me to come here to help your friends.
I won't be able to do that if I don't understand
what's actually going on.
I can't! I'm lame!
I make everyone around me suffer.
That's not true.
What would have made everyone suffer
is your mother succeeding in turning you
into the ruthless and lone warrior she wanted,
but you always found the strength inside yourself
to love and help other people,
and right now the only one suffering is you.
I'm not the good person you say I am, Marinette.
It's my fault Kazuno's lost confidence in himself.
Which means it's my fault their team isn't working.
When my mother told me that we were moving to France,
it was something that I really wanted to tell Kazuno
before we left, but I...
You don't have to tell me,
but maybe it's time you finally told him.
That's why you wanted to come here, isn't it?
I don't know how.
We'll figure it out.
I would have won if that dragon and that red-and-black bug
hadn't showed up and guided these incompetents!
Remember that you have a deal to honor, Moddler.
I'll help you to get your hands on every fragment
of the Stellar Matrix, and in return,
you help me escape.
These powers you gave me are useless!
Ladybug and Ryuko are just better organized.
- You know them? - I've seen them
at work before elsewhere.
If you want to free us both,
unleash your real potential, Moddler.
You can count on me, Supreme. I don't want
to spend one more day on this wretched planet.
This time I'll show them what I can really do!
Hm?
What are you doing, guardian?
Setting up a meeting to help Kagami,
but you can't say anything, okay, Longg?
- You're the guardian, guardian. - Tikki,
I need your help to write in Japanese.
"Hey, friends! I'm on holiday in Tokyo.
I'll be at my grandmother's booth this morning.
Signed Kagami."
- Do you think it'll be enough? - Hm...
- "Free dorayaki for everyone!" - Kagami?
How long have you been in this chat?
Does she know our secret?
I told you we should have created a new chat
for the Ultimate Defenders of the Earth.
- The Ultimate what? - The Ultimate cheesy team name.
- Ah! It's working! - Aren't you gonna answer them?
Kagami will answer them herself later today.
In the meantime, I'll turn off the notifications.
Hello, Ms. Tsurugi!
Ohayo, kid.
Uh, ohayo to you too.
Did you sleep well, Marinette?
Yes! Thank you!
Kagami and I were thinking that we'd love to help you
set up the Matsuri booth to thank you for having us.
That's so sweet of you. Thank you, Marinette.
Kagami!
Wake up! Your grandmother needs us!
Huh?
Marinette, you're smiling like you do
whenever you're up to one of your strange plans.
Oh, me? Nonsense!
Kagami!
- You're back! - Why did you just up
- and leave last year? - Disappearing without a trace
like a professional hacker.
Without even a goodbye party!
Yeah, without even granting me a rematch.
I was concerned with your disappearance, almost.
- You were? - Sure.
We're so happy to see you again,
even if it doesn't help your carbon footprint.
I heard so much about you all!
Aren't you gonna introduce me to your friends?
Mayotte, Miki,
Yu-Lu, Pili,
Ryo, Jeolla,
Nikko, Bulgan,
Karelia, Kiss,
Anglia, meet Marinette.
Hello, nice to meet you all!
Is this the new trend in France?
Quite surprising, but you wear it well.
What? This? No!
I left my suitcase at home and, uh...
anyway Kagami also mentioned Kazuno!
He's not here?
He hasn't answered in the chat.
Oh, then we should go get him, right?
Why do you want to go get him?
Well, because the more the merrier,
as we say in France.
Mm-hm... Okay, I'll take you.
We'll have our rematch when I get back.
By the way, Kagami, didn't you promise free dorayaki?
Haul the net!
- Hey there! - Huh?
Nice catch.
And, uh, were Kagami and Kazuno close friends?
No need to beat around the bush with me, Frenchie.
I know you sent that message to the group chat.
How did you guess?
Kagami never sent a message before,
and if she had, she wouldn't have written it the way you did.
Do you know if something happened between Kazuno
and Kagami before she left Tokyo?
Kagami had a crush on my Kazuno.
Unfortunately for her, he's been in love with me
since we were kids.
I feel sad for her.
Your Kazuno?
Hold on, does this mean you're in love with him too?
Of course, he's the best.
Kind, smart, altruistic.
And he's so cute when he blushes.
He's seized my heart just like he seizes victories in judo.
- But are you two together? - No.
Why not if you're both in love with each other?
Because he's never dared to confess his feelings to me.
We have arrived.
Have you told him that you love him?
No! And he cannot find out!
Why not?
Victory must be earned.
And they say I'm complicated.
He's not home?
Shoot, we're out of luck.
What do you want?
We're looking for Kazuno, Obaa-san.
Kazu-kun? He's running some errands for me.
Miki?
- Huh... - Oh, sorry!
Huh?
Sorry, Miki.
They remind me of someone.
Arigato gozaimashita.
Didn't you get Kagami's message, Kazuno?
Kagami didn't write it.
Okay, you're right, I did.
I'm Marinette, a friend of Kagami's.
Is Kagami here?
Yes, and if you come with us, you'll be able to talk to her.
I've hurt her, I'll never dare to face her again.
Huh? But that's exactly what Kagami tells me.
I mean the opposite, like, she tells me what you're saying,
but from her point of view. Ah!
She thinks she hurt you.
- What happened between you two? - A kaiju.
- A what? - There! A kaiju!
There too, there's another one.
Hm?
Longg, Bring the Storm!
Huh?
Wind Dragon!
So, you're Ryuko?
Promise me you'll never tell anyone.
Kazuno, we've gotta go. Marinette, you can never tell
anyone what you're about to see, okay?
Huh? What am I about to see?
- Do you promise? - Yes, yes.
You can count on me. I'm really good at keeping secrets.
Huh?
Miki, Present!
Stellar Connection!
Roar of Justice,
Stellar Leo!
Kazuno, Present!
Stellar Connection!
Cosmic Balance!
Stellar Capricorn!
Whoa, their transformation is so cool!
Are you really going to stay here and wait, Marinette?
No, I have to make sure that Kagami finally talks to Kazuno.
He needs to regain his confidence so we can save Tokyo.
Tikki, Spots On!
Lucky Charm!
Cool!
It looks like the signs I saw on the kaiju before.
Yeah, I see the signs too.
These aren't kaiju but another type of creature.
But created with a similar technique.
Aim for the symbols!
Huh?
It's working!
There are too many of them!
We're not gonna make it like this!
Should we split into two teams?
It's not two teams we need, it's a dozen.
Since every time they touch someone, their numbers grow.
There's gotta be something or someone behind this.
We have to find out,
otherwise, we'll keep being overwhelmed!
Storm Dragon!
Whoa...
You're not gonna believe this.
Ryuko is Kagami! How cool is that?
Kagami?
Kazuno.
Kazuno!
Leo!
Leo's been captured!
Miki?
It's all my fault.
Ryuko,
there's a misunderstanding between you and Kazuno.
I don't know what happened between you two,
but you've really got to talk to each other.
Otherwise, we won't be able to save Tokyo.
That's the reason why we're here, isn't it?
I'll help your friends, in the meantime.
She's one of them.
Ah, perfect.
Go back and bring me all the pieces of Stellar Matrix.
Leo's been captured because of me.
Storm Subsides.
Kagami.
No one can save that many victims at once.
Unless they're just victims!
That, I should be able to fix.
It could work, it will work.
Miraculous Ladybug!
Huh? Who are you?
- Huh? - Hey!
Don't touch my watch, you thing!
I'm not a thing, I'm the Moddler
and I want my Stellar Matrix.
Moddler,
now we know each other.
I owe you one, Ladybug.
I owe you an explanation, Kazuno.
{\an8}Dear Kazuno, I had never danced
{\an8}with anyone before, but I feel like I've been lucky enough
to have met the best person to learn from.
I thought you wouldn't come!
Is everything okay, Kagami?
Huh?
Why aren't you dancing?
I wish I could have danced
with you my whole life,
but for me the music stops today.
I don't want to dance anymore.
But why not?
It's pointless.
I don't understand.
My mother wants us to move to Paris.
Oh...
I don't feel sad. I always knew it would end
one day or another.
{\an8}That's okay, you know.
{\an8}We can still dance together online, remotely.
{\an8}It'd be even worse.
{\an8}Worse?
{\an8}Worse than what? Did I do something wrong?
You dream of dancing with Miki, not me.
I hope one day you find the strength to ask Miki to dance.
Thank you for these few steps with you, Kazuno.
I made a mistake, Kazuno. I shouldn't have come.
What? But...
Dancing with you is a suffering.
Game over!
Dancing with you was anything
but a suffering, Kazuno.
I'm the one who made you suffer.
I should have told you how I was really feeling,
but it was sad to leave and I had feelings for you.
Even though I love someone else today,
I had to heal the wound that I'd inflicted upon you.
I hope you can forgive me
and dance again.
Miraculous Ladybug!
Lucky Charm! Miraculous Ladybug!
Lucky Charm! Miraculous Ladybug!
Miraculous Ladybug! Miraculous Ladybug!
A single Ladybug cannot destroy so many opponents.
We need something bigger, more powerful.
The proper summoning requires all of us to do the choreography together,
but I'm not sure everyone is ready for that.
I am now.
- Are you sure? - Yes.
I think I've regained my taste for dance.
In that case, friends,
let's rise to our opponents' level so we can defeat them!
Ready?
Celestial Spirit Complete!
See? You should never be afraid to express your feelings.
Hey, Ladybug, don't tell me you can't make your own robot.
Challenge accepted, Leo!
Lucky Charm!
Ryuko, a little help, please?
Lightning Dragon!
So, what do you think?
Okay, not bad!
Now let's see which one's the best!
Capricorn, tell us where the kaiju's spots are.
Everyone else, stand ready.
We need to hit them all at the same time.
Transmitting targets.
Now!
Last dance!
Sagittarius, which would you say was the best robot?
Honestly, Leo, they were both equally awesome.
I think that's called teamwork.

and I'm sure that we can do it too.

to share your feelings again.

Come on!
Whoa!

I love you
and that I can't wait to see you again.
